Public Works Commission Agenda Report

To: Chair Merrick and Members of the Public Works Commission Prepared by: Robert DuBoux, Public Works Director/City Engineer Date prepared:   January 22, 2021 Meeting date: January 27, 2021 Subject: Capital Improvement Projects and Disaster Recovery Projects Status Report
RECOMMENDED ACTION: Receive and file report on the status of the City’s current and upcoming Capital Improvements Projects and Disaster Recovery Projects.
